Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 7 

HCID 

LABEL: HCIdea Proprietary Prescriber Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable uniquely identifies prescribers found in the proprietary HCIdea™ Prescriber Database. 

HCIdea has prescriber information from a variety of data sources, including the NPPES directory (the 
National Plan and Provider Enumeration System, which assigns a unique NPI to each provider), the 
Drug Enforcement
